assessment_objectives.objective: system media to be sanitized prior to disposal, release and/or reuse is defined.
sanitization techniques and procedures to be used for sanitization prior to disposal, release and/or reuse are defined.
system media is sanitized using sanitization techniques and procedures prior to disposal, release and/or reuse.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: techniques and procedures IAW NIST SP 800-088 Section 4: Reuse and Disposal of Storage Media and Hardware

assessment_objectives.objective: sanitization mechanisms with strength and integrity commensurate with the security category or classification of the information are employed.
circumstances requiring sanitization of portable storage devices are defined.
non-destructive sanitization techniques are applied to portable storage devices prior to connecting such devices to the system under circumstances.
equipment containing sensitive / regulated data is sanitized prior to disposal, reuse, or release out of organizational control.
system media that contain CUI are sanitized prior to disposal, release out of organizational control, or release for reuse.
system media containing sensitive/regulated data is sanitized or destroyed before disposal.
system media containing sensitive/regulated data is sanitized before it is released for reuse.
